category_sources: source_facts.description: Command-line interface for Cabal and Hackage; official Haskell Cabal overview describes Cabal as a Haskell build and packaging system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cabal-install; official Haskell Cabal site distinguishes cabal-the-tool as the cabal-install package.
docs_sources: Official Haskell Cabal overview links to the Cabal User Guide; official GitHub repository README covers Cabal and cabal-install.
repo_sources: Official Haskell Cabal source-code page says cabal-install now lives in the same repository as Cabal and links https://github.com/haskell/cabal/; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Cabal and Hackage CLI; official Haskell Cabal overview describes building and packaging Haskell libraries and programs.
